CVE-2024-48877.title: A memory corruption vulnerability exists in the Shared String Tab ...
CVE-2024-48877.summary: A memory corruption vulnerability exists in the Shared String Table Record Parser implementation in xls2csv utility version 0.95. A specially crafted malformed file can lead to a heap buffer overflow. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.
